# Acme Widget Toolkit

The Acme Widget Toolkit (AWT) is a fictional cross-platform UI framework used
in the Knowledge MCP test fixtures. It provides reusable widgets, theming
primitives, and a small reactive runtime.

Key components:

- **Widget** — base class for all UI elements.
- **Theme** — palette + typography tokens.
- **Reactor** — minimal observable system used to wire widgets to data.

AWT is maintained by the (fictional) Acme Open Source team and licensed under
the MIT license. Visit the (fictional) website at https://example.com/awt for
documentation.
